seoTitle: Wanerie vs Wangara — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wanerie and Wangara. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wanerie and Wangara.
heading: Wanerie vs Wangara — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wanerie, Western Australia and Wangara, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wanerie has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wangara (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wanerie or Wangara safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wanerie has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Wangara scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wanerie scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Wangara scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wanerie or Wangara?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wanerie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
